rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: `0.0 -> pre(t) + 0.1`
Place output assignments in implementation scope only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Use AGREE logical operators (`and`, `or`, `not(...)`, `=>`) for contract expressions
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
For component type contracts, only include input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees when concrete bounds or named constants are provided
Mode transition logic should use nested `if ... then ... else` expressions with proper temporal recurrence
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `assume "label": expression;`, `guarantee "label": expression;`, `eq name : type = expression;`, `const name : type = value;`, and `assign output = expression;` syntax
Stateful variables should be declared with initialized recurrence using `-> pre(...)` pattern
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assumptions and equations there
Do not encode AADL timing properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
